column1: # Supermarket Simulator Profit Tracker — CSV Format Reference
#   License       : Base game: 0-29 | DLC: DLC-{Name}-{Tier} e.g. DLC-Bakery-1
#   Storage       : Shelf | Fridge | Freezer | Produce Stall | Bakery Shelf | Pegboard | Hanger Rack | Ice Cream Stand
#   ItemsOrWeight : Number of items per box
column2: OR weight in kg for produce (IsWeightBased=true)

column1: #   ShelfCap      : How many items fit on one shelf slot
#   MarketSellPrice : Default in-game market sell price per item (or per kg for produce)
#   OnlineBuyPrice  : Default online order buy price per full box
#   LocalMarket   : e.g. Deli and Grocery | Meat and Dairy | Green Market | Liquor Store | Janitorial Supply
#   HasPickup     : true | false (false for all DLC products currently)
#   IsWeightBased : true | false (true for produce sold by weight)
#   IsVending     : true | false (vending machine compatible products)
#   DLC           : DLC group name: Bakery | Clothing | Electronics | Hardware | Essentials | IceCream | (blank for base game)
# NAME RULE: Product name is built as ""Category - Brand"" or just ""Category"" if Brand is - or blank"
# WARNING: Do not change Category+Brand of existing products — this changes the name and loses price history
